# search_locations { #socialinfrascorepy.search_locations }

```python
search_locations(client, query, country=None, state=None, limit=5)
```

Search for locations by place name.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name    | Type     | Description                                                                                              | Default    |
|---------|----------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| client  | SIClient | A client from :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.client` authenticated with :func:`~socialinfrascorepy.sign_in`. | _required_ |
| query   | str      | Place name to search.                                                                                    | _required_ |
| country | str      | Country filter.                                                                                          | `None`     |
| state   | str      | State / region filter.                                                                                   | `None`     |
| limit   | int      | Maximum rows to return (hard-capped at 5).                                                               | `5`        |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description             |
|--------|------------------|-------------------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame | Matching location rows. |

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> candidates = si.search_locations(authed, query="Ithaca", state="NY")
```
